name: German Rye Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Place ingredients in the bread machine in the order recommended by the manufacturer of your machine.
2. Use a regular bread cycle.
3. (Optional) Grind the caraway seeds before using, as preferred, for flavor but not for the seeds themselves.
4. (For Panasonic/National machines, use 3 1/2 teaspoons of yeast instead.)
